use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers, sidebars, and dashboards
Show online/offline/busy/away status indicators for user presence
Provide initials-based fallbacks when user images fail to load
Display user avatars with contextual status badges in chat or team interfaces
Create consistent user identity representations across multi-user applications
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based avatar component system featuring Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus sub-components. Supports multiple status variants (online, offline, busy, away) with rounded styling and fallback to initials for missing images. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for flexible theming.
